name: flutter_datetime_picker
reason: Uses deprecated Theme APIs; causes instant render crashes on Impeller.
migrationNotes: Minor rewrite. Update widget calls and dialog context handling.

name: flutter_facebook_login
reason: SDKs are ancient; fails Gradle builds and violates modern iOS privacy manifests.
migrationNotes: Drop-in API change, but requires updating FB developer console hashes.

name: apple_sign_in
reason: Obsolete cryptography; using this triggers automatic App Store review rejections.
migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Security nonce and identity token handling changed.

name: adhara_socket_io
reason: Hardcoded to Socket.io v2; immediately disconnects from modern Node.js backends.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Change connection builders and stream subscriptions.

name: flutter_money_formatter
reason: No Null Safety; completely refuses to compile on Dart 3.0+.
migrationNotes: Use standard Dart localization number formats.

name: progress_dialog
reason: Context leaks and layout overflows break modern navigation stacks.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Just use native Flutter dialogs with a CircularProgressIndicator.

name: flutter_rating_bar
reason: Gesture math is broken on high-refresh-rate screens (120Hz+).

name: flutter_offline
reason: Underlying connectivity logic reports false positives on Android 14+.
migrationNotes: Huge logic change. Must manually build the Offline overlay UI now.

name: clippy_flutter
reason: Legacy canvas painting logic creates severe visual artifacting.
migrationNotes: Draw paths manually to ensure GPU compatibility.

name: flutter_masked_text
reason: Massive memory leaks from un-disposed internal TextEditingControllers.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Replaces custom controllers with native `inputFormatters`.

name: ff_navigation_bar
reason: Throws "RenderBox was not laid out" exceptions on device rotation.
migrationNotes: Total UI replacement. Different configuration parameters.

name: states_rebuilder
reason: Incompatible with modern Dart class modifiers (sealed/final).
migrationNotes: Total architecture rewrite. Requires migrating to event-driven state.

name: flutter_google_places
reason: Locked to ancient HTTP dependencies; causes unresolvable pubspec conflicts.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Parameter mapping is slightly different.

name: zefyr
reason: Architecture is dead; keyboard handling completely broken on iOS 18.
migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Document formats (JSON) are different. Need data migration.

name: buidler
reason: Half-finished project; core layout files throw null exceptions.

name: flutter_twitter_login
reason: Hardcoded to Twitter API v1.1; 100% fail rate since X killed the endpoints.
migrationNotes: Rewrite auth logic to support X API v2.

name: stripe_payment
reason: Uses deprecated Stripe APIs; transactions will be rejected by the processor.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use the official SDK; update backend webhook logic too.

name: flutter_audio_recorder
reason: Fails on Android 14+ due to new strict microphone background policies.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Better async permission handling and codec support.

name: chewie_audio
reason: Stagnant codebase; doesn't support modern system-level audio routing.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. `just_audio` is far more powerful but requires custom UI.

name: flutter_speed_dial
reason: Animation controllers misfire, causing UI to permanently lock up.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use Flutter's modern native custom FAB animations.

name: websafe_svg
reason: Obsolete; Flutter natively supports Web SVGs now. Adds dead weight.
migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement. Change package imports.

name: flutter_statusbar_manager
reason: Conflicts directly with modern Flutter SystemChrome implementations.

name: nice_button
reason: Uses syntax completely removed from the Dart language; won't compile.

name: liquid_progress_indicator
reason: Shaders are incompatible with Impeller, causing screen-tearing glitches.
migrationNotes: UI swap. Linear and circular alternatives available.

name: flutter_tags
reason: Internal state management is broken; deleting tags crashes the app.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Different controller logic.

name: flutter_markdown
reason: Discontinued by Google; vulnerable to unpatched markdown injection flaws.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Syntax highlighters and builders must be mapped.

name: flutter_adaptive_scaffold
reason: Discontinued; relies on older layout constraints that fail on foldable phones.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Roll your own responsive breakpoints.

name: ios_platform_images
reason: Discontinued; redundant since modern Flutter seamlessly handles iOS assets.

name: palette_generator
reason: Discontinued; incredibly slow on modern high-res device camera feeds.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Different async methods for extracting dominant colors.

name: flutter_image
reason: Discontinued; memory leaks heavily compared to modern network image caching.

name: js
reason: Completely replaced by modern Wasm-compatible dart:js_interop.

name: scoped_model
reason: Ancient logic that causes massive, app-wide widget rebuild jank.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to `ChangeNotifierProvider`.

name: provide
reason: Officially deprecated by Google 7 years ago; full of syntax errors.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to locator pattern.

name: flutter_sparkline
reason: Pre-null-safety; custom painters throw out-of-bounds exceptions.
migrationNotes: Rewrite to use modern chart primitives.

name: flutter_sticky_header
reason: Completely breaks Flutter's modern sliver scroll physics; severe jank.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Use native sliver logic wrapped in tools.

name: flutter_circular_chart
reason: Relies on dead animation APIs; chart simply renders as a black box.
migrationNotes: Rewrite to use modern pie chart implementations.

name: flutter_full_pdf_viewer
reason: Platform channel architecture causes hard thread crashes on Android 15.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. New controller logic and memory management.

name: flutter_html_view
reason: Massive security risk; highly vulnerable to modern XSS injections.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Update tag styling parameters.

name: flutter_youtube_view
reason: YouTube changed their iframe API policies; videos refuse to play.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Swap controller initialization.

name: flutter_webview_plugin
reason: Uses the old v1 Android embedding; blocks app compilation entirely.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Shift to modern `WebViewController` architecture.

name: admob_flutter
reason: Uses retired Google Ad APIs; ads will not serve and revenue is lost.
migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of ad widget placement and initialization logic.

name: firebase_admob
reason: Discontinued officially; completely incompatible with current Firebase SDKs.
migrationNotes: Complete rewrite. Ads decoupled from Firebase wrapper.

name: flutter_blue
reason: Over 800 open issues; completely fails to handle Android 14+ BLE permissions.
migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Fork that fixes permissions; API is mostly similar.

name: flutter_ble_lib
reason: Native iOS bridge crashes instantly when requesting background execution.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Stream parsing is fundamentally different.

name: flutter_beacon
reason: Ghosted repo; hardware scanning methods are dead on modern mobile OS.

name: flutter_nfc_reader
reason: Lacks modern tag tech support; background reading is totally broken.

name: flutter_contact_picker
reason: Violates Play Store/App Store privacy policies by leaking full contact lists.

name: contacts_service
reason: Unmaintained; fails to fetch modern cross-linked cloud contacts.
migrationNotes: Easy migration. Better cross-platform parameter support.

name: sms
reason: Android blocked this level of SMS access years ago; immediate crash.
migrationNotes: Re-architect app to not require broad SMS reading.

name: telephony
reason: Fails modern foreground service requirements on Android 15/16.
migrationNotes: Write native Kotlin/Swift for precise telecom functions.

name: flutter_launch
reason: Obsolete functionality that `url_launcher` has handled natively for years.
migrationNotes: Complete drop-in URL execution.

name: vibrate
reason: Uses deprecated Android vibration classes that no longer trigger hardware.
migrationNotes: Drop-in swap to `HapticFeedback.vibrate()`.

name: flutter_incall_manager
reason: Audio route conflicts freeze the device speakerphone permanently.

name: flutter_webrtc_wrapper
reason: (Note: The 0.x versions) Video tracks desync and memory spike infinitely.
migrationNotes: Heavy update. SDP negotiation methods changed.

name: flutter_staggered_grid
reason: (Original repo versions) Unoptimized scroll logic eats 100% of the CPU.
migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to the maintained version.

name: flutter_slidable
reason: (v0.x versions) Gestures conflict with modern Flutter internal navigators.

name: flutter_icons
reason: Generates giant font files that drastically bloat app bundle size.

name: font_awesome_flutter
reason: (Legacy versions) Icons render as boxes due to missing font maps.
migrationNotes: Fix pubspec constraints; update icon names.

name: google_fonts
reason: (Original 1.x) Dynamic fetching blocks the main UI thread during load.

name: flutter_spinkit
reason: (v4.x) Hardcoded TickerProviders cause exceptions when screens pop.

name: flutter_shimmer
reason: Fails to render transparent gradients on Impeller engine correctly.
migrationNotes: UI swap. Syntax is heavily builder-focused now.

name: flutter_page_indicator
reason: Animation logic expects PageController structures that are now obsolete.

name: flutter_card_swipper
reason: Ghosted project; memory management for image cards is nonexistent.

name: snaplist
reason: Custom scroll physics are completely broken by Flutter 3+ engine updates.

name: carousel_pro
reason: Dead UI library; auto-play timers will memory leak and crash the app.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. `carousel_slider` has a totally different builder pattern.

name: flutter_swiper
reason: Unmerged Null Safety PR has been sitting open for 4+ years.
migrationNotes: Easy migration. Maintained fork with the exact same API.

name: flutter_adv_networkimage
reason: Cache eviction fails, silently filling up user disk space until OS crashes.

name: cached_network_image_v1
reason: Legacy version 1.x; fundamentally incompatible with Dart 3 typing.
migrationNotes: Drop-in mostly, but requires updating error builder syntax.

name: multi_image_picker
reason: Does not support Android Scoped Storage; returns dead file paths.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use official `pickMultiImage` method.

name: image_picker_saver
reason: Fails on iOS 16+ due to missing modern photo library permission flags.
migrationNotes: Modern drop-in replacement for saving to gallery.

name: flutter_exif
reason: Buffer parsing logic throws formatting exceptions on modern HEIC photos.

name: flutter_ffmpeg
reason: Underlying mobile FFmpeg libraries are discontinued and fail to compile.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Execution syntax entirely refactored.

name: flutter_sound_v7
reason: (Legacy versions) Missing background service permissions for Android 15.
migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of the playback session builder.

name: audioplayers_v0
reason: (v0.x versions) Native code fails to build on Apple Silicon (M1/M2/M3) Macs.

name: flutter_vlc_player_orig
reason: Severe texture cache issues lead to green-screen artifacting on video load.
migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Better Wasm/Desktop support.

name: video_launcher
reason: Obsolete wrapper; native OS no longer responds to these specific intents.
migrationNotes: Route to native browser or system handlers safely.

name: flutter_downloader_orig
reason: Progress synchronization isolates are broken, leaving ghost notifications.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of background task initialization.

name: open_file_v3
reason: Fails to map modern MIME types, causing the OS to reject opening PDFs/docs.
migrationNotes: Easy migration. Maintained fork with exact API.

name: file_picker_v3
reason: (Legacy versions) Returns relative paths that the app lacks permission to read.

name: path_provider_ex
reason: Redundant; the official `path_provider` covers all external storage needs now.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Use the official modern directories.

name: flutter_notifications_v8
reason: (Pre-v10) Completely ignores Android 14+ POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission requirements.

name: workmanager_v04
reason: Background execution keys fail to register, so tasks never actually fire.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Callbacks require stricter async handling.

name: flutter_bg_service_old
reason: Fails to keep isolates alive; killed instantly by modern OS battery managers.
migrationNotes: Moderate update. Adjust foreground notification hooks.

name: android_alarm_manager
reason: WakeLocks fail; alarms simply do not trigger when the screen is off.
migrationNotes: Mostly drop-in, but requires updating AndroidManifest permissions.

name: flutter_workmanager
reason: Dead repo; incompatible with modern Android WorkManager architecture.

name: geolocator_apple_v1
reason: Standalone version dead; lacks modern iOS precise location toggles.
migrationNotes: Do not use standalone components. Use main package.

name: geolocator_android_v1
reason: Standalone version dead; crashes on Android 14 location permission prompt.
migrationNotes: Same as above. Use unified plugin.

name: google_api_availability
reason: Obsolete detection methods return false negatives on modern devices.
migrationNotes: Write custom Kotlin script for exact API versioning.

name: location_permissions
reason: Completely replaced by `permission_handler`; causes manifest merge errors.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Unified permission asking method.

name: trust_fall
reason: Easily bypassed by modern root tools; provides zero actual security in 2026.
migrationNotes: Architecture rewrite. Implements much stricter TEE checking.

name: safe_device
reason: Flagged physical Samsung/Pixel devices as emulators due to outdated hardware lists.
migrationNotes: Write custom logic using physical device flag.

name: flutter_secure_storage
reason: (Pre-v5.0) Keychain/Keystore logic is old; data can be wiped on OS upgrades.
migrationNotes: Critical update. Fixes Android Keystore initialization.

name: biometric_storage
reason: Blocks the main UI thread during biometric handshakes, freezing the app.
migrationNotes: Rewrite logic. Securely bind auth token to local storage manually.

name: local_auth
reason: Dead standalone package; lacks modern strong biometric fallback handlers.

name: flutter_app_badger
reason: Badge counting logic is entirely broken on Android 14+ launchers.
migrationNotes: Drop-in equivalent with updated native launcher maps.

name: flutter_shortcut_shortcuts
reason: Fails to register dynamic shortcuts on modern iOS/Android homescreens.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite using official Flutter quick actions API.

name: flutter_email_sender
reason: File attachment intents crash due to modern FileProvider security rules.
migrationNotes: Build `mailto:` schemes natively, or use backend emailing.

name: flutter_sms_inbox
reason: Google Play Store explicitly bans apps using this broad SMS read permission.
migrationNotes: Redesign app to not scrape user text messages.

name: call_log
reason: Dead privacy wrapper; app will be suspended from app stores for using it.
migrationNotes: Stop reading call logs.

name: keyboard_actions
reason: FocusNode conflicts cause the keyboard to continuously flicker open and closed.
migrationNotes: Rewrite using `FocusManager.instance.primaryFocus?.unfocus()`.

name: connectivity
reason: Completely dead, fails on Android 14+.
migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement. Change imports and class names to add `_plus`.

name: share
reason: Fails iOS 18 privacy manifests.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Method signatures changed slightly to support `XFile`.

name: device_info
reason: Missing modern device identifiers.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update imports and model getters.

name: package_info
reason: Fails to read modern Gradle setups.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Returns modern async version models.

name: sensors
reason: Battery draining event loops.
migrationNotes: Drop-in stream replacement. Better memory management.

name: battery
reason: API deprecations on Android 15.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update stream listeners.

name: android_intent
reason: Missing modern Intent flags.
migrationNotes: Drop-in. Update platform channel calls.

name: charts_flutter
reason: Dart 3 incompatible; looks ancient.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. You must rebuild all chart datasets from scratch.

name: Hive (v1/v2)
reason: Legacy architecture, sync limits, and abandoned by original creator.
migrationNotes: Update to the Community Edition (hive_ce) fork which is actively maintained and Dart 3/Wasm compatible, or execute a total rewrite to Drift for relational needs.

name: isar
reason: Abandoned by the creator; unpatched data corruption risks with enum evolutions and weak Wasm support.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Shift to a stable SQLite-backed architecture like Drift, or Realm if a NoSQL object store is strictly required.

name: GetX
reason: Maintenance liability; breaks often.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift from global singletons to provider injection.

name: easy_localization
reason: Slow updates, context leaks.
migrationNotes: Heavy migration. Move from runtime parsing to build-time code generation.

name: pull_to_refresh
reason: Breaks Impeller physics.
migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Switch controller logic to modern native RefreshIndicator wrappers.

name: background_locator
reason: Fails Android 14+ strict bg policies.
migrationNotes: Paid plugin, but total drop-in for enterprise. (Free alt: `geolocator`).

name: jitsi_meet
reason: Broken WebRTC bridges.
migrationNotes: Moderate effort. Update event listeners and view configurations.

name: flutter_pagewise
reason: Stagnant list builder logic.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Shift to PagingController pattern.

name: audioplayers (v0.x)
reason: Fails on Apple Silicon builds.
migrationNotes: Heavy migration. `AudioCache` is gone, completely new async API.

name: file_picker (v1/v2)
reason: Returns unreadable cache paths.
migrationNotes: Moderate. Update async fetching and handle new Scoped Storage rules.

name: flutter_local_notifications (v8)
reason: Ignores Android 14 POST flags.
migrationNotes: Heavy rewrite. Initialization and tap-handling completely overhauled.

name: flutter_rating_bar (Orig)
reason: Broken on 120Hz screens.
migrationNotes: Check for active forks or rebuild using native Gesturedetector + Row.

name: js (original)
reason: Blocks Wasm compilation.
migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Requires migrating to strict Wasm-ready extension types.

name: flutter_slidable (v0)
reason: Navigator conflicts.
migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of the ActionPane builders.

name: google_fonts (v1)
reason: Main thread blocks.
migrationNotes: Drop-in update, massive performance boost.

name: flutter_spinkit (v4)
reason: TickerProvider exceptions.
migrationNotes: Drop-in update.

name: flutter_advanced_networkimage
reason: Eviction failures crash OS.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use standard caching logic.

name: local_auth (Legacy)
reason: Dead standalone package.
migrationNotes: Drop-in update, improves biometric fallback mechanisms.

name: moor
reason: Replaced entirely by Drift; ancient code generator fails on modern Dart SDKs.
migrationNotes: Requires renaming annotations and running the Drift migration tool.

name: pedantic
reason: Officially deprecated by the Dart team in favor of unified core lints.
migrationNotes: Update analysis_options.yaml to include flutter_lints.

name: effective_dart
reason: Superseded by standard Dart linter rules; ruleset is obsolete.
migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement in analysis options.

name: lint
reason: Abandoned third-party lint package; causes false positives on Dart 3 modifiers.
migrationNotes: Standardize to official lints.

name: flushbar
reason: Discontinued; completely breaks on modern Navigator 2.0 (Router) stacks.
migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to the maintained community fork.

name: qr_code_scanner
reason: Native bindings fail Android 15 camera foreground policies, causing instant crashes.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite using ML Kit base.

name: flutter_barcode_scanner
reason: Uses deprecated Android V1 embeddings; refuses to compile on Gradle 8+.
migrationNotes: Shift to ML Kit based scanner.

name: barcode_scan
reason: Abandoned repo; totally incompatible with modern iOS privacy manifests.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of scanning overlays and callbacks.

name: flutter_neumorphic
reason: Heavy shadow math creates massive screen tearing on the Impeller engine.
migrationNotes: Update package name; underlying Impeller issues patched in fork.

name: flutter_staggered_animations
reason: Uses old TickerProvider architecture causing severe jank on 120Hz screens.
migrationNotes: Shift to modern extension-based declarative animations.

name: animations
reason: Pre-Material 3 package; page transitions lack predictive back gesture support.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Use native Material 3 transitions where possible.

name: simple_animations (v2)
reason: Stateless animation logic is fundamentally incompatible with Dart 3 type safety.
migrationNotes: Total syntax rewrite using modern Control constructs.

name: fluro
reason: Legacy routing system that fundamentally conflicts with deep-linking in Router API.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to declarative route trees.

name: beamer
reason: Maintainer MIA; unpatched bugs with WebAssembly (Wasm) URL synchronization.
migrationNotes: Total architectural rewrite for navigation.

name: vrouter
reason: Dead project; throws layout exceptions when resizing Wasm browser windows.
migrationNotes: Shift to official Flutter routing package.

name: routemaster
reason: Unmaintained; memory leaks active Route objects on heavy app traversal.
migrationNotes: Rewrite tab navigation and route delegates.

name: flutter_modular (v3)
reason: Global singletons block Dart 3 compilation; deeply flawed memory management.
migrationNotes: Complete module syntax refactoring.

name: dio_http_cache
reason: Incompatible with Dio v5+; causes unresolvable pubspec dependency conflicts.
migrationNotes: Drop-in interceptor swap, but different cache store configurations.

name: alice
reason: Overlay intercepts block native predictive back gestures on Android 14.
migrationNotes: Maintained fork with exact same API.

name: catcher
reason: Fails to capture modern Flutter engine unhandled isolate errors.
migrationNotes: Drop-in replacement to the maintained version.

name: flutter_crashlytics
reason: Uses the defunct Fabric namespace; logs will go to a dead server.
migrationNotes: Total initialization rewrite. Use modern Firebase Core.

name: firebase_ml_vision
reason: Google permanently retired the backend APIs; package is functionally dead.
migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Shift from Firebase to on-device ML Kit.

name: flutter_camera_ml_vision
reason: Fails iOS 18 hardware privacy manifests, causing automatic app rejection.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of camera view integration.

name: camera_awesome (v0.x)
reason: Lacks Android Scoped Storage flags; videos save to corrupted, unreadable paths.
migrationNotes: Significant rewrite of the builder syntax.

name: flutter_villains
reason: Uses highly deprecated page transition math; causes blank screens on push.
migrationNotes: Replace with modern animation extensions.

name: rubber
reason: Gesture physics deadlocks with Flutter's internal Scrollables.
migrationNotes: Use native or standard bottom sheet implementations.

name: sliding_up_panel
reason: Causes fatal layout constraints errors on foldable devices.
migrationNotes: Drop-in API change to fix layout math.

name: backdrop
reason: Completely incompatible with Material 3 standard theming.
migrationNotes: Moderate theme updates required.

name: flutter_inappbrowser
reason: Legacy wrapper; fails Wasm compilation and uses obsolete WKWebView configs.
migrationNotes: Update namespace and controller syntax.

name: flutter_webview_pro
reason: Abandoned file-upload fork; modern webview_flutter supports files natively.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite to modern official plugin.

name: flutter_fluid_slider
reason: Custom path drawing throws severe artifacting errors on Impeller.
migrationNotes: Change widget implementation.

name: xlider
reason: Pre-null-safety; codebase completely fails to compile on Dart 3.
migrationNotes: Drop-in fork.

name: flutter_rating
reason: Dead repository; incompatible with Material 3 iconography sizes.
migrationNotes: UI component swap.

name: smooth_star_rating
reason: Internal GestureDetector freezes input loops on 120Hz displays.
migrationNotes: UI component swap.

name: flutter_colorpicker (v0.x)
reason: Relies on deprecated HSV math that creates inaccurate hex codes.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Update color translation handling.

name: color_picker
reason: Dead project; dialog contexts leak and crash modern navigators.
migrationNotes: Swap dialog implementation.

name: flutter_material_color_picker
reason: Doesn't support Material 3 seed-generated color schemes.
migrationNotes: Swap widget and update logic.

name: day_night_picker
reason: Animation controllers are left un-disposed, causing massive memory leaks.
migrationNotes: Mostly drop-in, update imports.

name: flutter_rounded_date_picker
reason: Uses deprecated Theme properties that immediately throw compilation errors.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Dialog presentation changed.

name: flutter_calendar
reason: Unmaintained; layout fails entirely on web/Wasm targets.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite. Shift to modern calendar builders.

name: flutter_calendar_carousel
reason: Swiping physics conflicts with Flutter 3 engine updates, causing stutter.
migrationNotes: Complete UI swap.

name: syncfusion_flutter_calendar (v18)
reason: Legacy commercial package; completely fails Dart 3 type checks.
migrationNotes: Update license keys and fix null-safety breaks.

name: intro_slider
reason: Layouts render as 1x1 pixel boxes on foldable and dual-screen devices.
migrationNotes: UI rewrite. Data models for pages changed.

name: intro_views_flutter
reason: Ignores device SafeAreas; content is obscured by modern mobile notches.
migrationNotes: Total UI replacement.

name: flutter_onboarding_slider
reason: Ghosted repo; state misfires cause onboarding to skip pages randomly.
migrationNotes: Total UI replacement.

name: transformer_page_view
reason: Matrix translations are obsolete and crash the Impeller renderer.
migrationNotes: Rethink page view animations.

name: page_view_indicators
reason: Dead repo; doesn't support dynamically sized or infinite pagers.
migrationNotes: Swap indicator UI.

name: flutter_typeahead (v1)
reason: Overlay floats behind keyboards on modern Android 14 inset architectures.
migrationNotes: Major update to overlay rendering logic.

name: autocomplete_textfield
reason: Fails to release FocusNodes, breaking physical keyboard inputs on iPadOS.
migrationNotes: Rewrite the suggestion builder callbacks.

name: flutter_search_bar
reason: Overrides AppBar illegally in Material 3; breaks standard Scaffold layouts.
migrationNotes: Use Flutter's built-in M3 SearchAnchor widget.

name: material_floating_search_bar
reason: Throws 'RenderBox was not laid out' exceptions when rotating the device.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite. Shift to native Material 3 widgets.

name: search_widget
reason: Uses legacy dart:io calls that completely block WebAssembly (Wasm) builds.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

name: flutter_chips_input
reason: Text deletion triggers out-of-bounds exceptions, crashing the app.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite of input controllers.

name: badges (v1)
reason: Positioning logic broken; badges render off-screen in Material 3.
migrationNotes: Syntax overhaul; badge positioning changed entirely.

name: flutter_inner_drawer
reason: Fails completely with predictive back gestures on Android 14.
migrationNotes: Architecture change. Update scaffold wrapping.

name: hidden_drawer_menu
reason: Dead project; animation controllers lack disposal logic.
migrationNotes: Total UI overhaul.

name: foldable_sidebar
reason: Abandoned; incompatible with null safety and Dart 3.
migrationNotes: Total UI overhaul.

name: unicorndial
reason: Breaks entirely with standard Scaffold floatingActionButtonLocations.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite of action items.

name: hawk_fab_menu
reason: Obsolete custom animations that conflict with the native engine.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

name: flutter_arc_speed_dial
reason: Trigonometry math fails on high-DPI screens, displacing icons.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

name: bubble_bottom_bar
reason: Fails safe area constraints; overflows into the iOS Dynamic Island.
migrationNotes: Moderate rewrite. Update item building logic.

name: curved_navigation_bar (v0.x)
reason: Severe stutter when pushing new routes over the bar.
migrationNotes: Fix dependencies and null-safety errors.

name: fancy_bottom_navigation
reason: Contains non-standard JS interops that fail Wasm compilation.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

name: convex_bottom_bar (v2)
reason: Gesture area overlaps system navigation bars on Android 15.
migrationNotes: Update handling of system insets.

name: flutter_snake_navigationbar
reason: Shader effects conflict with the Impeller engine, crashing the app.
migrationNotes: Total UI rewrite.

name: bottom_navy_bar
reason: Dead repository; unoptimized rebuilds cause CPU spiking.
migrationNotes: UI swap. Similar aesthetic.

name: responsive_builder (v0.x)
reason: Hardcoded breakpoints are totally obsolete for modern foldables.
migrationNotes: Refactor sizing information properties.

name: flutter_screenutil (v4)
reason: Init function crashes on initialization in modern Flutter views.
migrationNotes: Update init pattern to use standard builders.

name: size_config
reason: Antiquated singleton pattern that breaks completely on web resizes.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite to responsive scaling.

name: easy_localization_loader
reason: Asset bundles fail to load synchronously, breaking Wasm builds.
migrationNotes: Shift from runtime loading to code-generation.

name: flutter_i18n
reason: Unmaintained; delegates fail to register properly in Dart 3.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of localization architecture.

name: i18n_extension
reason: String extension injections leak memory wildly on large translation sets.
migrationNotes: Massive syntax rewrite.

name: intl_translation
reason: Officially deprecated by the Dart team.
migrationNotes: Shift to the community standard generation.

name: flutter_localizations (v1)
reason: Pre-null-safety; lacks modern RTL language mappings.
migrationNotes: Update SDK constraints.

name: flutter_mobx (v0.x)
reason: Generators output invalid Dart 3 code, blocking compilation.
migrationNotes: Update build_runner and regenerate all stores.

name: fish_redux
reason: Abandoned by Alibaba; deeply incompatible with Dart 3 class modifiers.
migrationNotes: Total architecture rewrite. Huge effort.

name: flutter_redux
reason: Architecturally obsolete; causes unnecessary full-tree widget rebuilds.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite to event-driven bloc architecture.

name: redux
reason: Synchronous reducers block the main thread causing UI freezing.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: mvc_pattern
reason: Non-idiomatic framework that breaks modern Flutter DevTools.
migrationNotes: Complete paradigm shift.

name: stacked (v1)
reason: ViewModel locators throw exceptions due to old Provider bindings.
migrationNotes: Update ViewModel builder syntax.

name: momentum
reason: Dead state management library; causes infinite build loops.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: binder
reason: Abandoned state library; incompatible with Impeller engine bindings.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: flutter_hooks (v0.x)
reason: Hook states decouple and cause memory leaks on rapid navigation.
migrationNotes: Update syntax and hook definitions.

name: functional_widget
reason: Code generator is dead; fails to generate valid Dart 3 widgets.
migrationNotes: Rewrite using HookConsumerWidgets manually.

name: flutter_stetho
reason: Meta discontinued Stetho; fails to build with modern Android Gradle Plugins.
migrationNotes: Use standard Dart tooling for DB debugging.

name: flutter_flipperkit
reason: Native bridges completely fail to compile on Apple Silicon (M-series) Macs.
migrationNotes: Use official Flutter DevTools.

name: moor_ffi
reason: Deprecated native bridges; entirely breaks Wasm compilation.
migrationNotes: Update SQLite dependency structures.

name: sqflite_sqlcipher
reason: Dead package; native C bindings break on Android 15.
migrationNotes: Update imports and native libraries.

name: shared_preferences_windows
reason: Integrated into the core package; keeping this causes duplicate symbol errors.
migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

name: shared_preferences_macos
reason: Integrated into core package; redundant dead weight.
migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

name: shared_preferences_web
reason: Integrated into core package; redundant dead weight.
migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

name: sembast (v1)
reason: Synchronous writes freeze the UI thread on modern devices.
migrationNotes: Major update to async database factory logic.

name: localstorage
reason: Uses obsolete synchronous file I/O that crashes Wasm applications.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Data must be migrated.

name: flutter_cache_manager (v1)
reason: Fails to clear disk space, leading to out-of-storage app crashes.
migrationNotes: Update cache eviction callbacks.

name: http_middleware
reason: Incompatible with the modern Dart http package architecture.
migrationNotes: Rewrite request interceptors.

name: chopper (v3)
reason: Code generator fails completely on Dart 3.
migrationNotes: Regenerate all network services.

name: retrofit (v1)
reason: Pre-null-safety; generator outputs dead code.
migrationNotes: Regenerate client services.

name: graphql (v3)
reason: Fails to compile on modern Flutter SDKs.
migrationNotes: Huge rewrite. Link configurations changed entirely.

name: hasura_connect
reason: Unmaintained; websockets instantly disconnect from modern Hasura backends.
migrationNotes: Total network architecture rewrite.

name: flutter_socket_io
reason: Hardcoded to ancient Android NDKs that Play Store rejects.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: flutter_pusher
reason: Abandoned; native bindings throw unhandled exceptions.
migrationNotes: Use official pusher SDK.

name: pusher_websocket_flutter
reason: Fails on iOS 18 background execution policies.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of channel binding logic.

name: signalr_flutter
reason: Dead repo; connections fail against .NET 8+ backends.
migrationNotes: Moderate connection string update.

name: agora_rtc_engine (v4)
reason: Agora officially retired these SDK versions; calls will not connect.
migrationNotes: Massive rewrite of video view and event handlers.

name: youtube_player_iframe (v2)
reason: YouTube blocked the old Web API; iframe renders a black screen.
migrationNotes: Controller syntax completely changed.

name: audioplayer
reason: Completely dead package; conflicts directly with modern audio routers.
migrationNotes: Total syntax replacement.

name: flutter_sound_lite
reason: Deprecated by maintainers in favor of the full package.
migrationNotes: API drop-in, but requires full FFMPEG setup.

name: flutter_midi
reason: C++ bridges fail completely on macOS 15, blocking desktop builds.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite using Dart-native synthesis.

name: camera (v0.x)
reason: Fails Android 14 Scoped Storage and iOS 18 hardware manifest requirements.
migrationNotes: Heavy update to async camera initialization.

name: mapbox_gl
reason: Discontinued by Mapbox; map tiles will fail to load.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite to the official v10 SDK.

name: flutter_map (v0.x)
reason: Leaflet core fundamentally broken; maps render as gray squares.
migrationNotes: Complete rewrite of map options and layers.

name: location (v3)
reason: Fails Android 14 exact vs approximate location prompt requirements.
migrationNotes: Update permission request flow.

name: bitsdojo_window
reason: Fails to compile on modern Windows 11 SDKs.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of desktop window controls.

name: desktop_window
reason: Obsolete since native Flutter desktop size support was added.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: window_size
reason: Obsolete experimental package discontinued by Google.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite.

name: flutter_web_plugins (legacy)
reason: Built directly into the Flutter SDK now; causes namespace collisions.
migrationNotes: Remove explicit dependency.

name: timeago (v2)
reason: Pre-null-safety; blocks Dart 3 compilation.
migrationNotes: Update syntax for custom locales.

name: date_format
reason: Dead repository; incompatible with modern intl patterns.
migrationNotes: Rewrite all date string parsing.

name: supercharged (v1)
reason: String/Number extensions fail Dart 3 strict typing.
migrationNotes: Syntax updates required.

name: fluttertoast (v8)
reason: Uses deprecated overlay APIs causing context leaks and app freezes.
migrationNotes: Shift to contextless FToast pattern.

name: flushbar_route
reason: Obsolete routing setup that crashes on Navigator 2.0.
migrationNotes: Remove routing layer, use standard overlays.

name: flutter_absolute_path
reason: Dead file URI parser; fails completely on Android 14 ContentProviders.
migrationNotes: Rewrite all local file path resolution.

name: file_utils
reason: Abandoned package; redundant with Dart's modern dart:io.
migrationNotes: Use standard File and Directory classes.

name: flutter_string_encryption
reason: Cryptography algorithms broken by modern OS standards; insecure.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of encryption logic.

name: aes_crypt
reason: Insecure default paddings make it vulnerable to padding oracle attacks.
migrationNotes: Rewrite using secure PKCS7 padding.

name: flutter_keychain
reason: Dead repository; unpatched vulnerabilities and crashes on iOS 18.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite. Keys must be migrated.

name: flutter_uploader
reason: Background isolates fail to register on Android 15, silently failing uploads.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of background task execution.

name: flutter_downloader
reason: Background isolates killed instantly by modern OS battery managers.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of download initialization.

name: flutter_local_notifications (v9)
reason: Fails Android 14 POST_NOTIFICATIONS requirements.
migrationNotes: Requires explicitly asking for exact notification permissions.

name: flutter_native_timezone
reason: Integrated into flutter_timezone; keeping this causes linker errors.
migrationNotes: Drop-in API change.

name: timezone (v0.x)
reason: Pre-null-safety; blocks Dart 3 compilation entirely.
migrationNotes: Total rewrite of timezone initialization and database fetching logic.
